title: Electric Motor, Power Tool, and Related Repairers
description: Repair, maintain, or install electric motors, wiring, or switches.

tasks.text: Inspect and test equipment to locate damage or worn parts and diagnose malfunctions, or read work orders or schematic drawings to determine required repairs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Reassemble repaired electric motors to specified requirements and ratings, using hand tools and electrical meters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure velocity, horsepower, revolutions per minute (rpm), amperage, circuitry, and voltage of units or parts to diagnose problems, using ammeters, voltmeters, wattmeters, and other testing devices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Repair and rebuild defective mechanical parts in electric motors, generators, and related equipment, using hand tools and power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lift units or parts such as motors or generators, using cranes or chain hoists, or signal crane operators to lift heavy parts or subassemblies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record repairs required, parts used, and labor time.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Disassemble defective equipment so that repairs can be made, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust working parts, such as fan belts, contacts, and springs, using hand tools and gauges.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lubricate moving parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read service guides to find information needed to perform repairs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect electrical connections, wiring, relays, charging resistance boxes, and storage batteries, following wiring diagrams.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Scrape and clean units or parts, using cleaning solvents and equipment such as buffing wheels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Weld, braze, or solder electrical connections.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Verify and adjust alignments and dimensions of parts, using gauges and tracing lathes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Steam-clean polishing and buffing wheels to remove abrasives and bonding materials, and spray, brush, or recoat surfaces as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set machinery for proper performance, using computers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Test equipment for overheating, using speed gauges and thermometers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Reface, ream, and polish commutators and machine parts to specified tolerances, using machine tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain stocks of parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut and form insulation, and insert insulation into armature, rotor, or stator slots.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assemble electrical parts such as alternators, generators, starting devices, and switches, following schematic drawings and using hand, machine, and power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Solder, wrap, and coat wires to ensure proper insulation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Rewire electrical systems, and repair or replace electrical accessories.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean cells, cell assemblies, glassware, leads, electrical connections, and battery poles, using scrapers, steam, water, emery cloths, power grinders, or acid.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Rewind coils on cores in slots, or make replacement coils, using coil-winding machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove and replace defective parts such as coil leads, carbon brushes, and wires, using soldering equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Hammer out dents and twists in tools and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Seal joints with putty, mortar, and asbestos, using putty extruders and knives.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair and operate battery-charging equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sharpen tools such as saws, picks, shovels, screwdrivers, and scoops, either manually or by using bench grinders and emery wheels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test battery charges, and replace or recharge batteries as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
